item.title: MIUI OS2.0.201.0.VMWJPXM Fastboot update for Redmi 12 5G Japan
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi 12 5G Japan

Codename: sky

Version: OS2.0.201.0.VMWJPXM | 15.0

Size: 6.8 GB

MD5: a94056c7df590ed0aed71aa94ad3e141

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to August 2025. Increased system security.
